chapter_title.ar: باب مَا أَمَرَ النَّبِيُّ ( صلى الله عليه وآله ) بِالنَّصِيحَةِ لِأَئِمَّةِ الْمُسْلِمِينَ وَ اللُّزُومِ لِجَمَاعَتِهِمْ وَ مَنْ هُمْ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 103 – What the Prophet<sup>saww</sup> ordered with the advice of the Imams<sup>asws</sup> of the Muslims and the necessitation to their<sup>asws</sup> gatherings, and who they<sup>asws</sup> are

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (333/ 4)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (333/ 4)
text: مَنْ فَارَقَ جَمَاعَةَ الْمُسْلِمِينَ وَ نَكَثَ صَفْقَةَ الْإِمَامِ جَاءَ إِلَى اللَّهِ عَزَّ وَ جَلَّ أَجْذَمَ .

en.hubeali: (It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> having said: ‘The one who separates from a group of the Muslims and disregards the allegiance of the Imam<sup>asws</sup> would come to Allah<sup>azwj</sup> Mighty and Majestic mutilated’.
en.sarwar: 5. Through the same chain of narrators it is narrated from abu ‘Abdallah (a.s.) who has said the following. “Whoever would distance himself from the company of the Muslims and disregard the pledge of allegiance with the Imam he will come before Allah with his hand cut off.”
